title: ProvenanceRewriteResult v1
description: Result of node.rewrite_provenance: the correction actually applied (field, previous and new value, whether the engine-assembled novelty-delta card claim was synchronized), plus idempotency metadata and the current budget snapshot.

delta_claim_updated.description: Always true on success: syncing the engine-assembled novelty-delta card claim is mandatory, so a rewrite that cannot find exactly one matching claim fails closed with delta_claim_missing rather than returning here. Retained for result-shape stability.

grounding_audit_reset.description: True when the node carried a grounding_audit that was reset to null because the rewrite changed the novelty-delta claim it had certified; the node must be re-grounded via node.set_grounding_audit before promotion.
